centralFund.payFromCentralDesc: Mark this payment as using the shared pool.
centralFund.autoVerificationDesc: The system will automatically verify the amount.
centralFund.title: Central Fund
centralFund.notConfiguredDesc: No central fund configured. Pool money together for shared expenses.
centralFund.ownerOnly: Only the trip owner can set this up.
centralFund.configureDesc: Set up a central fund to manage shared group expenses. The trip owner can assign a treasurer.
centralFund.errorRequiredFields: Please select a treasurer and enter amount per person.
centralFund.amountDesc: This amount will be used to calculate the total central fund size.
centralFund.errorCannotReduceAmount: Cannot decrease the amount per person because members have already made contributions. The new amount must be at least ฿{{amount}}.
centralFund.errorCannotChangeTreasurer: Cannot change the treasurer because contributions have already been made.
centralFund.cannotChangeTreasurer: The treasurer cannot be changed because contributions have already been made.
centralFund.treasurerOnlyEdit: Only the assigned treasurer can edit the amount after set up.
centralFund.payDesc: Record an expense paid using the central fund.
centralFund.requestReimbursementDesc: Request money back from the central fund for expenses you paid.
centralFund.actionsDesc: Manage expenses or request reimbursements from the central fund pool.
centralFund.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this request?
centralFund.confirmDeleteSettlement: Are you sure you want to delete/undo this transaction?
centralFund.fullyPaid: You have fully paid your share.
centralFund.pendingConfirmation: Waiting for treasurer to confirm receipt.
centralFund.pleasePay: Please pay your contribution to the treasurer.
